blended.narrative: Wintergreen is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,450 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 65°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
